message:
🌱 Add localai: PARALLEL_REQUESTS=true has no effect on gguf models mission (#1179)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "localai-1467-parallel-requests-true-has-no-effect-on-gguf-models",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "localai: PARALLEL_REQUESTS=true has no effect on gguf models",
+    "description": "PARALLEL_REQUESTS=true has no effect on gguf models. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify localai troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your localai deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai -n localai --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review localai configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant localai configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nkubectl get configmap -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=localai\n```\n**LocalAI version:**\nimage: quay.io/go-skynet/local-ai:v2.0.0-cublas-cuda12\n\nLinux dev-aisrv01 6.1.0-13-amd64 #1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Debian 6.1.55-1 (2023-09-29) x86_64 GNU/Linux\n\nWe tried to run parallel requests against the codellama"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for PARALLEL_REQUESTS=true has no effect on gguf models",
+        "description": "integrate changes from llama.cpp\n\nMerged the Changes from https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp/blob/master/examples/server/server.cpp\nHardcoded params.cont_batching to true! on line 2471 should this be loaded from env like LLAMACPP_PARALLEL?\n\n- [ x] Yes, I signed my commits.\n```yaml\nDBG Loading Model codellama-34b-instruct.Q4_K_M.gguf with gRPC (file: /models/codellama-34b-instruct.Q4_K_M.gguf) (backend: llama): \n...  \nsingleActiveBackend:false parallelRequests:false}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm PARALLEL_REQUESTS=true has no effect on gguf… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai -n localai --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n localai --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "integrate changes from llama.cpp\n\nMerged the Changes from https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp/blob/master/examples/server/server.cpp\nHardcoded params.cont_batching to true! on line 2471 should this be loaded from env like LLAMACPP_PARALLEL?\n\n- [ x] Yes, I signed my commits.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "DBG Loading Model codellama-34b-instruct.Q4_K_M.gguf with gRPC (file: /models/codellama-34b-instruct.Q4_K_M.gguf) (backend: llama): \n...  \nsingleActiveBackend:false parallelRequests:false}",
+        "DBG Loading Model codellama-34b-instruct.Q4_K_M.gguf with gRPC (file: /models/codellama-34b-instruct.Q4_K_M.gguf) (backend: llama-cpp): \n...\n parallelRequests:true}",
+        "DBG GRPC(codellama-34b-instruct.Q4_K_M.gguf-127.0.0.1:45563): stderr CUDA error 1 at /build/backend/cpp/llama/llama.cpp/ggml-cuda.cu:7043: invalid argument"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "localai",
+      "community",
+      "llm-serving",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "localai"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/mudler/LocalAI/issues/1467",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/mudler/LocalAI",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/mudler/LocalAI/pull/1616"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with localai installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
